title: HM-8
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''HM-8''' was a type of [[Concussion missile/Legends|concussion missile]] manufactured by [[Dymek/Legends|Dymek]].

Larger and more destructive than the [[HM-6 Concussion Missile Launcher/Legends|HM-6]], the HM-8 was a high-yield [[Assault concussion missile|''assault'']]-grade missile capable of extremely heavy damage. The ''[[Jade Shadow]]'' made use of these missiles using two concealed HM-8 launchers. Despite being ''assault''-grade, the HM-8 was dwarfed in power by the much larger assault concussion missiles carried by capital ships.

{{Weapon-stub}}
